title: Microsoft Entra User
description: Schema for a Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) user resource as represented in the Microsoft Graph API. Contains identity, contact, organizational, and authentication profile properties.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user (GUID). Assigned automatically by Microsoft Entra ID.

displayName.description: The name displayed in the address book for the user. Maximum length is 256 characters.

givenName.description: The given name (first name) of the user. Maximum length is 64 characters.

surname.description: The surname (family name or last name) of the user. Maximum length is 64 characters.

userPrincipalName.description: The user principal name (UPN) in the format alias@domain. The domain portion must be a verified domain in the tenant.

mail.description: The SMTP address of the user (e.g., jeff@contoso.com). Changes to this property also update the proxyAddresses collection.

mailNickname.description: The mail alias for the user. Must be specified when creating a new user. Maximum length is 64 characters.

accountEnabled.description: true if the account is enabled; otherwise, false. Must be specified when creating a new user.

jobTitle.description: The user's job title. Maximum length is 128 characters.

department.description: The name of the department in which the user works. Maximum length is 64 characters.

officeLocation.description: The office location in the user's place of business.

companyName.description: The company name associated with the user. Maximum length is 64 characters.

mobilePhone.description: The primary cellular telephone number for the user. Maximum length is 64 characters.

businessPhones.description: The telephone numbers for the user. Only one number can be set. Read-only for users synced from on-premises.

streetAddress.description: The street address of the user's place of business. Maximum length is 1024 characters.

city.description: The city in which the user is located. Maximum length is 128 characters.

state.description: The state or province in the user's address. Maximum length is 128 characters.

postalCode.description: The postal code for the user's postal address. Maximum length is 40 characters.

country.description: The country or region in which the user is located. Use ISO 3166 two-letter country code (e.g., US, GB).

usageLocation.description: A two-letter country code (ISO 3166). Required for users assigned licenses due to legal requirements.

preferredLanguage.description: The preferred language for the user in ISO 639-1 code format (e.g., en-US).

userType.description: A string value that classifies the user type. Member users are internal to the tenant, Guest users are invited from outside.

employeeId.description: The employee identifier assigned to the user by the organization. Maximum length is 16 characters.

employeeType.description: Captures the enterprise worker type (e.g., Employee, Contractor, Consultant, Vendor).

employeeHireDate.description: The date and time when the user was hired or will start work in a future hire.

onPremisesSyncEnabled.description: true if synced from an on-premises directory; false if originally cloud-created; null if never synced.

onPremisesSamAccountName.description: The on-premises SAM account name synchronized from the on-premises directory.

onPremisesDistinguishedName.description: The on-premises distinguished name (DN) synchronized from Active Directory.

onPremisesDomainName.description: The on-premises domain name synchronized from Active Directory.

onPremisesImmutableId.description: Used to associate an on-premises Active Directory user account to their Entra user object. Must be specified if using a federated domain for the UPN.

onPremisesLastSyncDateTime.description: The last time the object was synced with the on-premises directory.

proxyAddresses.description: List of proxy addresses (e.g., SMTP:jeff@contoso.com, smtp:jeff@contoso.onmicrosoft.com).

assignedLicenses.description: The licenses assigned to the user including disabled service plans.

assignedPlans.description: The plans assigned to the user.

identities.description: Identities associated with the user account including social identities for B2B/B2C scenarios.

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the user was created.

lastSignInDateTime.description: The last interactive sign-in date and time for the user.

deletedDateTime.description: The date and time the user was deleted. Only present for deleted users in the deletedItems container.

PasswordProfile.description: Contains the password profile associated with a user including the password and policies for change enforcement.

password.description: The password for the user. Must satisfy the tenant's password complexity requirements. Required when creating a user.

forceChangePasswordNextSignIn.description: If true, the user must change the password on the next sign-in.

forceChangePasswordNextSignInWithMfa.description: If true, the user must perform MFA before being forced to change password.

AssignedLicense.description: Represents a license assigned to a user.

disabledPlans.description: Collection of the unique identifiers for plans that have been disabled.

skuId.description: The unique identifier for the SKU.

AssignedPlan.description: Represents a plan assigned to a user.

assignedDateTime.description: Date and time the plan was assigned.

service.description: The name of the service (e.g., exchange, SharePoint).

servicePlanId.description: GUID that identifies the service plan.

ObjectIdentity.description: Represents an identity used to sign in to a user account, including social identities.

signInType.description: Specifies the user sign-in type (e.g., emailAddress, userName, federated).

issuer.description: The issuer of the identity (e.g., contoso.com, facebook.com).

issuerAssignedId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the user by the issuer.
